title: Is CSX Stock A Good Buy At $31?
text: The current high inflationary environment, rising interest rates, and recession fears have weighed on railroad stocks.

title: CSX Corporation: Focus On Buybacks And Dividend Growth
text: In this market, I believe it is key to focus on quality dividend growth and buybacks given lower stock price valuations and an expected decline in real dividends. CSX offers high-quality dividend growth and buybacks thanks to strong free cash flow and a sustainable business model.

title: CSX Chief Executive Officer to Address Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) President and Chief Executive Officer, James M. Foote, will address the Bernstein 38th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference in New York on Thursday, June 2nd at 2:30 pm Eastern time.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Hold on to CSX Stock for Now
text: CSX is benefiting from strong freight demand and favorable pricing. The company's efforts to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

title: Rail shippers applaud federal appeals court ruling on alleged price fixing
text: Attorneys representing shippers in litigation involving four Class I railroads praised a federal appeals court decision this week that clarified what evidence can be submitted in two cases involving alleged price fixing in the early 2000s.  Stephen Neuwirth, an attorney with Quinn Emanuel Urqhuart & Sullivan, said in a statement that the “opinion will greatly assist the shippers in making their antitrust case against the railroads.

title: CSX (CSX) Down 14.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: CSX (CSX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Daniel Loeb's Third Point Enters CSX Position, Exits Alphabet and Upstart
text: Daniel Loeb (Trades, Portfolio), manager of Third Point Offshore, disclosed in a regulatory filing that his firm's top trades during the first quarter included new holdings in CSX Corp. ( CSX , Financial) and Alcoa Corp. ( AA , Financial), a 90% reduction to its stake in Amazon.com Inc. ( AMZN , Financial) and the closure of its positions in Alphabet Inc. ( GOOGL , Financial), Upstart Holdings Inc. ( UPST , Financial) and Accenture PLC ( ACN , Financial).

title: CSX rejects blame from Tampa Electric for low coal supplies
text: Tampa Electric has had to curtail operations at its Big Bend power station in Florida, and the utility blames the curtailment on “severe rail service shortages” and a reduction of coal deliveries. But CSX says the problem lies with the mine producing the coal, not with rail service.

title: CSX Executive Vice President to Address Wolfe Research Global Transportation & Industrials Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) Executive Vice President of Sales & Marketing, Kevin Boone, will address the 15th Annual Wolfe Research Global Transportation & Industrials Conference in New York on Tuesday, May 24 at 11:30 am Eastern time.

title: CSX Honors 65 Customers with 28th Annual Chemical Safety Excellence Award
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) presented 65 customers with the company's annual Chemical Safety Excellence Award for their outstanding contribution to the safe transportation of hazardous materials in 2021.

title: CSX Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 10, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) announced that the Company's Board of Directors approved a $0.10 per share quarterly dividend on the company's common stock. The dividend is payable on June 15, 2022, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 31, 2022.

title: CSX Chief Financial Officer to Address Bank of America Securities Transportation, Airlines and Industrials Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 10, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Sean Pelkey, will address the 2022 Bank of America Securities 29th Annual Transportation, Airlines and Industrials Conference in Boston on Tuesday, May 17 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time.

title: Why CSX Could Remain Dominant in Freight Transport
text: Its investment in rail-to-highway transport increases exposure to trends in freight trucking.
